name: rove-web
description: Rove — landing page + GitHub Pages build that wraps the mobile package's React Native Web export.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && (cd ../mobile && pnpm exec expo export -p web --output-dir ../web/dist/app) && cp dist/app/index.html dist/app/404.html && cp -R landing/. dist/ && cp ../scripts/demo/preview.gif dist/preview.gif
scripts.build:debug: rm -rf dist && (cd ../mobile && pnpm exec expo export -p web --output-dir ../web/dist/app --source-maps --no-minify) && cp dist/app/index.html dist/app/404.html && cp -R landing/. dist/ && cp ../scripts/demo/preview.gif dist/preview.gif
